subject: Gothorita, a mid-stage psychic Pokemon with a gothic aesthetic and star-patterned ribbons, standing in a dramatic outdoor setting
description: A humanoid figure with a smooth black domed head and large round eyes stands amid a rocky outdoor setting. Star-shaped or sparkle-accented ribbon appendages hang from the sides of the head. The body is wrapped in a layered black and white outfit. Around the figure, small star-like lights or sparkles float in the air. The background shows purple-toned rocky terrain and a moody twilight or overcast sky, giving the scene a witchy, atmospheric quality. The figure has a composed, slightly imperious stance.
foreground: humanoid figure with gothic bonnet and ribbon appendages, surrounded by floating star sparkles
background: rocky purple terrain under moody overcast sky
emotion: composed and watchful with an imperious stillness
